nasb.text: “When you go out to battle against your enemies, and the Lord your God delivers them into your hands and you take them away captive,

esv.text: “When you go out to war against your enemies, and the Lord your God gives them into your hand and you take them captive,

cnv.text: “你出去和仇敵作戰的時候，耶和華你的　神把他們交在你手裡，你就把他們擄了去。

ccb.text: “你们和敌人交战时，你们的上帝耶和华会把敌人交给你们，使他们成为你们的俘虏。
